tooltip_content.text: Airdrops are usually found in somewhat hidden locations and usually contain really valuable loot. You can easily tell if they've been looted from a distance.

Always available and open (if spawned on opposite side of map).
Always available and open (if spawned on opposite side of map).
<font color="#e0e0e0" face="Open Sans, sans-serif">Use the Cable Car Switch to call a cable car. Pay 7,500 Koen to activate the Extraction Point. Stand in either cable car to start extraction.</font>
<font color="#e0e0e0" face="Open Sans, sans-serif">Active 25min after the raid starts. Only available sometimes.</font>
Open the sluice from the 407 control panellocated on the second floor of the dam to start the 90s countdown for the first-floor Extraction Point.
<font color="#e0e0e0" face="Open Sans, sans-serif">Active 25 min after the raid starts.</font>
Use the lifeboat key to turn on the engine. 50s to activation.
Deliver 2 dog tags and get 60s to extract using the Armored Vehicle Extraction Point.
Always available and open (if spawned on opposite side of the map).
Always available and open (if spawned on opposite side of the map).
Electronic Safe located on the first floor on top of a desk (20 second timer).

children.title: First Floor Cable Car Station Safe

tooltip_content.text: Electronic Safe located on the first floor near the center of the room (20 second timer).
Electronic Safe located on the second floor of the main building in the Sewage Plant area (20-second timer).
Electronic Safe located on the in a warehouse behind a wood pile (20 second timer).
Electronic Safe located on the bridge [only appears sometimes] (20 second timer).
Electronic Safe located on the third floor right inside a corner office (20 second timer).
Electronic Safe located on the third floor on top of a desk (20 second timer).
Key to the storage room on the third floor of Northridge Hotel Building C. It is currently used as a temporary armory and may contain crucial military supplies.
Key to Building C Lounge 1 on the third floor of Northridge Hotel Building C. It is currently being used as a temporary server room and holds a lot of valuable electronic equipment.

children.title: Building C Lounge Private Room Key

tooltip_content.text: Key to the private lounge in VIP lounge 2 on the third floor of Northridge Hotel Building C. The room may hold a lot of valuable personal items.
Key to the cinema on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building D. There may be interesting items there.
Key to room 202 on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building D. It is currently being used as an armory. There may be rare military supplies there.
Key to room 208 on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building D. The room is currently being used as an office and mey hold electronics equipment.
A key for hotel room 207 on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building A, currently being used as an armory.
Key to the reception room on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building B. The room holds a lot of valuable items.
A key to room 203 on the second floor of Northridge Hotel Building B. The room is currently being used as an office. There might be some office items inside.
Key to the hotel manager's room in the Office on the first floor of Northridge Hotel Building B. There might be some valuable items inside.
Key to room 115 on the first floor of Northridge hotel Building C. It is currently being used as a power storage room.
Key to a house in Northridge N. Village
Key to the Workshop on the first floor of Sewage Plant Work Area 1 in Northridge. There are some workbenches inside.
Key to the Cashier's Office in the Observation Deck Cafeteria. Several valuables are inside.
This key opens the Cafeteria Storage in the Camp Service Center.
This is the key to the Manager's Office on the second floor of the Northridge Service Area. There are valuables inside.
Key to the Lifeboat on Northridge Lake
